text.title: AI Feature Incident Runbook Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the ai-feature-incident-runbook methodology end-to-end.

step.name: triage-on-page
step.action: Apply triage matrix: severity (P1..P4) based on quality drop / cost spike / user impact / safety.

step.name: decide-kill-or-mitigate
step.action: P1 with safety/cost-spike → kill. P2 with quality-only → mitigate (rollback prompt SHA / model pin) first.
step.decision-gate: If unsure, kill — re-enable after RCA is faster than rolling back from a customer-visible regression.

step.name: execute-mitigation-ladder
step.action: Rollback prompt → rollback model → traffic-shift to fallback → full kill. Stop at first effective step.

step.name: communicate
step.action: Send internal comm + customer-facing status update from template.

step.name: hand-off-to-post-mortem
step.action: Open post-mortem ticket; pin all logs / dashboards / decisions.
